subscriptions.rate_limit: Limited GPT-4o messages; GPT-4o mini unrestricted
subscriptions.usage_control: Message-based rate limits
subscriptions.notes: No Codex agent access

subscriptions.rate_limit: ~80 msgs/3h (GPT-4o); ~50 msgs/week (o1); limited o3/o4-mini; Codex limited
subscriptions.usage_control: Message-based rate limits per time window
subscriptions.notes: Codex runs in sandboxed VM, tasks take 1-30 min

subscriptions.rate_limit: Unlimited GPT-4o, o1, o1-pro, o3, o4-mini; Codex full access
subscriptions.usage_control: Unlimited access to all models; Codex free during preview
subscriptions.notes: o1 pro mode uses extra compute for hardest problems

subscriptions.rate_limit: Higher than Plus; ~100+ msgs/3h GPT-4o; full Codex access
subscriptions.usage_control: Message-based limits per seat; admin console
subscriptions.notes: Minimum 2 users; data not used for training

subscriptions.rate_limit: Highest limits; unlimited for most models
subscriptions.usage_control: Enterprise-grade rate limits; SSO; audit logs; SOC 2
subscriptions.notes: Custom pricing available; enterprise security & compliance

subscriptions.rate_limit: Baseline access; limited messages per 5h session
subscriptions.usage_control: Session-based (5h rolling); varies with demand
subscriptions.notes: No Claude Code; no Opus access

subscriptions.rate_limit: 5x Free tier; ~45+ msgs/5h (varies by model)
subscriptions.usage_control: Session-based (5h rolling); usage credits available
subscriptions.notes: Claude Code included; best for short coding sprints

subscriptions.rate_limit: 5x Pro (25x Free); higher output limits; priority access
subscriptions.usage_control: Two-tier session caps (5h + weekly); usage credits available
subscriptions.notes: Best for everyday coding in larger codebases

subscriptions.rate_limit: 20x Pro (100x Free); highest output limits; top priority
subscriptions.usage_control: Two-tier session caps (5h + weekly); usage credits available
subscriptions.notes: Most access for power users; heavy daily coding

subscriptions.rate_limit: 1.25x Pro per seat; higher than Pro
subscriptions.usage_control: Per-member limits; usage credits available; admin console
subscriptions.notes: Minimum 5 seats; SSO & domain capture

subscriptions.rate_limit: No per-seat caps; unlimited via API-rate billing
subscriptions.usage_control: Pay-per-token at API rates; admin-set spend limits
subscriptions.notes: 20+ seats self-serve; 50+ sales-assisted; HIPAA-ready

subscriptions.rate_limit: 2,000 code completions/month; 50 premium requests/month
subscriptions.usage_control: Premium request quotas (50/mo); base models free
subscriptions.notes: No Copilot CLI; no MCP; no cloud agents

subscriptions.rate_limit: Unlimited base models; 300 premium requests/month + $0.04/req overage
subscriptions.usage_control: Premium request quotas; different model multipliers (Opus=10x, GPT-4.5=50x)
subscriptions.notes: Premium requests: 300/mo; base models (GPT-4o/4.1) unlimited

subscriptions.rate_limit: Unlimited base models; 1,500 premium requests/month + $0.04/req overage
subscriptions.usage_control: Premium request quotas (1,500/mo); model multipliers apply
subscriptions.notes: 5x premium requests vs Pro (1,500 vs 300)

subscriptions.rate_limit: Unlimited base models; 300 premium requests/user/month + $0.04/req overage
subscriptions.usage_control: Premium request quotas per user; org-wide policy management
subscriptions.notes: Cloud agents, MCP, chat skills, org policies, code review

subscriptions.rate_limit: Unlimited base models; 1,000 premium requests/user/month + $0.04/req overage
subscriptions.usage_control: Premium request quotas; full enterprise governance
subscriptions.notes: Requires GitHub Enterprise Cloud

subscriptions.rate_limit: Limited agent requests; 50 fast requests/month
subscriptions.usage_control: Request-based (limited); Auto Mode not available for premium models
subscriptions.notes: No Composer; no background agents; no Max Mode

subscriptions.rate_limit: Auto Mode unlimited; $20 credit pool (~225 Sonnet requests); overage at API rates
subscriptions.usage_control: Credit-based ($20/mo pool); Auto Mode free & unlimited; premium model selection costs credits
subscriptions.notes: Auto Mode unlimited; credits only for manual premium model selection

subscriptions.rate_limit: Auto Mode unlimited; $70 credit pool (~790 Sonnet requests); overage at API rates
subscriptions.usage_control: Credit-based ($70/mo pool); 3.5x Pro credits
subscriptions.notes: Best for daily agent-heavy workflow

subscriptions.rate_limit: Auto Mode unlimited; $400 credit pool (~4,500 Sonnet requests); priority

subscriptions.rate_limit: Per-user credit pool; admin-managed
subscriptions.usage_control: Credit-based per user; central admin; SSO

subscriptions.rate_limit: 60 RPM; 1,000 RPD (agent/CLI); 6,000 code completions/day; 960 chat/day

subscriptions.notes: Model auto-selected (Pro/Flash); no manual model choice

subscriptions.rate_limit: Higher RPM/RPD than free; ~1,500+ RPD agent/CLI

subscriptions.rate_limit: 120 RPM; 1,500 RPD

subscriptions.rate_limit: $300 credits/mo (~200K requests); 5h: $90, weekly: $180

subscriptions.rate_limit: ~80 prompts/5h; ~400 prompts/week; 100 MCP calls/month

subscriptions.rate_limit: ~600 Pro searches/day; unlimited quick searches
